caribbean.headline: Strong Winds and High Seas Impact Bimini Today
caribbean.paragraph: Bimini is experiencing sustained winds of 42 knots with wave heights reaching 9.3 feet and a dominant northerly swell period of 8 seconds. Rain chances are elevated at 73 percent, while Nassau is also seeing strong winds up to 37 knots, creating challenging marine conditions across the northern Bahamas.

mediterranean.headline: Heavy Rain and Moderate Winds Impact Haifa Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Haifa is experiencing moderate winds sustained at 20 kt with wave heights reaching 6.8 ft and a dominant WNW swell period of 6 seconds. Rain probability is very high at 94 percent, indicating prolonged wet conditions affecting maritime operations and port activities in the Eastern Mediterranean.
